_comment: xfail baseline for scripts/validate.js. Each entry is an example case that currently FAILS schema validation due to a known v0.1 schema defect. CI stays green while reality matches this list. To fix a defect: correct the schema/example, then delete the corresponding entry here and confirm the validator reports the case as PASS.

known_failures.defect: DEFECT-1 game.json unsatisfiable: inherits type const 'event' and required 'category' from event.json
known_failures.detail: game.json (allOf -> event.json) inherits type const 'event' while also pinning type const 'game' (impossible), and inherits required 'category' (which game.json pins to const 'other') while the example omits it.

known_failures.defect: DEFECT-2 stat_line.json metrics oneOf rejects integers
known_failures.detail: metrics additionalProperties uses oneOf:[number,integer,...]; an integer matches both number and integer, so oneOf (exactly-one) fails for every integer metric. Should be anyOf or a type array.
The game record inside the example export package fails for the same reason as payloads/game.json.

known_failures.defect: DEFECT-2 stat_line.json metrics oneOf rejects integers
known_failures.detail: The stat_line record inside the example export package fails for the same reason as payloads/stat_line.json.
